default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Marília as the new recruiter at GrowthX and align on initial priorities and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marília to focus on understanding account manager roles from Kyle and recruiting process from Daniel this week](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Current recruiting setup (Workable, Hirevue) needs significant cleanup and organization](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Company is remote-first but considering SF office space for customer events/dinners](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Flexible work hours, emphasis on quality output over strict schedules](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)

## Topics

### Company Structure and Hiring Priorities

  - [Org chart reviewed: operations team (Bridget, Marília, Erickson, Yutsif) separate from client-facing org](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Client-facing org has 3 layers: Managing Directors, Managing Editors, Account Managers](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Account Manager layer (lowest tier) is highest hiring priority, includes roles like SEO writer, copywriter](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Kyle oversees client-facing org; Marília to meet with him to understand role requirements](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Current Recruiting Tools and Processes

  - [Using Workable (ATS), but disorganized with stale candidates](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [AI-powered screening process built by Daniel, integrated but not connected to Workable](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Hirevue used for one-way video interviews](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [LinkedIn Recruiter Lite license currently; considering upgrade for bulk messaging](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)

### Onboarding Project and Priorities

  - [Marília to create ideal hiring process for one role, including hiring manager screen questions](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Meet with Kyle to understand account manager roles and hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Connect with Daniel to learn about the AI-powered recruiting process](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Review and organize candidates in Workable and Hirevue](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Remote-first, but some Bay Area employees meet at WeWork on Tuesdays](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2261.0)
  - [Considering SF office space primarily for hosting customer events/dinners](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Flexible work hours, focus on quality output rather than strict schedules](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marília to schedule meetings with Kyle and Daniel](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Bridget to add Marília to LinkedIn Recruiter and other necessary tools](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Bridget to send screenshots of org chart and headcount model](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Daily check-ins planned for the first few weeks of onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Marília to review onboarding materials and provide feedback on the process](https://fathom.video/share/6HeVQ_cys7PkzDJWrUCwfZFdqJBz9LqE?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

action_items.description: Clean up & organize candidates in Workable, focus on account manager roles
Schedule meeting with Kyle re: account manager roles & expectations
Add Marília to Whimsical, Hirevue, LinkedIn Recruiter; send org chart screenshots
Schedule meeting w/ Daniel re: AI-powered recruiting process & tools
Review LinkedIn Recruiter Light, assess need for upgrade
Schedule follow-up meeting w/ Marília for tomorrow
